name: linSetRespBitStream
title: linSetRespBitStream
syntax: long linSetRespBitStream (long frameId, byte bitStream[], long numberOfBits); // form 1
long linSetRespBitStream (long frameId, byte bitStream[], long numberOfBits, long timeoutPrevention); // form 2
long linSetRespBitStream (long frameId, byte bitStream[], long numberOfBits, long timeoutPrevention, long count); // form 3
description: Sets up a bit stream as the response to the specified frame.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description: LIN frame identifier in the range 0 .. 63

parameters.name: bitStream
parameters.description: The bit stream array to be sent as a response. Maximum number of bits: 2^31-1.

parameters.name: numberOfBits
parameters.description: Number of bits in the bitStream array to be sent.

parameters.name: timeoutPrevention
parameters.description: 0: deactivates the timeout prevention for the 7259-transceiver. 1: activates the timeout prevention for the 7259-transceiver.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of times, the bit stream shall be sent as a response before deactivating itself.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.

description: Send LIN response for the frame MotorControl as a bit stream.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
